title: 配置第一代虚拟机的 BIOS 与启动顺序
code:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
$testName = 'WMITEST_gen1_bios'

function Wait-Job2($p){
  if(-not $p){ return 7 }
  $j = [wmi]$p
  while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j = [wmi]$p }
  return $j.JobState
}

$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# 创建第一代虚拟机 (SubType:1)
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns`:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName = $testName
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:1'
$r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# 取虚拟机自身的 VSSD
$vssd2 = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
$vssd2 = [wmi]$vssd2.__PATH

# 第一代 BootOrder 枚举 (uint16[]): 0=Floppy 1=CD/DVD 2=HardDrive(IDE) 3=Network/PXE
$vssd2.BootOrder    = [uint16[]]@(3,0,2,1)
$vssd2.BIOSNumLock  = $true
$r2 = $vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
if($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r2.Job | Out-Null }

# 读回
$vssd3 = [wmi]$vssd2.__PATH
"BootOrder="    + ($vssd3.BootOrder -join ',')
"BIOSNumLock=" + $vssd3.BIOSNumLock

# 清理
$r3 = $vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)
if($r3.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r3.Job | Out-Null }
output:
Created VM Name=8FC53FD3-F3AA-4626-884F-84950A996F50
OrigBootOrder=1,2,3,0
OrigBIOSNumLock=False
ModifySystemSettings rv=0
ReadBackBootOrder=3,0,2,1
ReadBackBIOSNumLock=True
BootOrderChanged=True
BIOSNumLockChanged=True
Cleanup OK: no residual
RESULT: PASS
notes: BootOrder 为 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData 的 uint16[] 属性，仅对第一代虚拟机 (SubType:1) 有意义。ValueMap: 0=Floppy(软盘), 1=CD/DVD, 2=HardDrive(IDE 硬盘), 3=Network/PXE。数组顺序即启动搜索顺序。
第一代虚拟机新建后的默认 BootOrder 为 1,2,3,0 (CD -> HDD -> Net -> Floppy)。
BIOSNumLock 为 boolean，控制 BIOS 内 NumLock 初始状态，新建默认 False。
修改流程：取虚拟机自身的 VSSD (通过 $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') 后 [wmi]__PATH 重取可写副本)，赋值后 GetText(1) 序列化交由 ModifySystemSettings。BootOrder 需强制转换为 [uint16[]]。
ModifySystemSettings 返回 0 表示同步完成，返回 4096 表示转入异步 Job，需轮询 JobState 至 7 (Completed)。
第二代虚拟机 (SubType:2) 不使用 BootOrder 整数枚举，改用 BootSourceOrder 设备引用数组。
title_en: Configure the BIOS and Boot Order of a Generation 1 Virtual Machine
notes_en: BootOrder is a uint16[] property of Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData and is meaningful only for generation 1 virtual machines (SubType:1). ValueMap: 0=Floppy, 1=CD/DVD, 2=HardDrive (IDE hard disk), 3=Network/PXE. The array order is the boot search order.
The default BootOrder of a newly created generation 1 virtual machine is 1,2,3,0 (CD -> HDD -> Net -> Floppy).
BIOSNumLock is a boolean that controls the initial NumLock state within the BIOS; the default for a new machine is False.

Modification procedure: obtain the virtual machine's own VSSD (via $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData'), then re-fetch a writable copy with [wmi]__PATH), assign values, and serialize with GetText(1) for submission to ModifySystemSettings. BootOrder must be cast to [uint16[]].
ModifySystemSettings returns 0 for synchronous completion, or 4096 for transition to an asynchronous job that must be polled until JobState reaches 7 (Completed).
Generation 2 virtual machines (SubType:2) do not use the BootOrder integer enumeration; they use the BootSourceOrder device reference array instead.
code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
$testName = 'WMITEST_gen1_bios'

function Wait-Job2($p){
  if(-not $p){ return 7 }
  $j = [wmi]$p
  while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j = [wmi]$p }
  return $j.JobState
}

$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# Create a generation 1 virtual machine (SubType:1)
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns`:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName = $testName
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:1'
$r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# Obtain the virtual machine's own VSSD
$vssd2 = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
$vssd2 = [wmi]$vssd2.__PATH

# Generation 1 BootOrder enumeration (uint16[]): 0=Floppy 1=CD/DVD 2=HardDrive(IDE) 3=Network/PXE
$vssd2.BootOrder    = [uint16[]]@(3,0,2,1)
$vssd2.BIOSNumLock  = $true
$r2 = $vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
if($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r2.Job | Out-Null }

# Read back
$vssd3 = [wmi]$vssd2.__PATH
"BootOrder="    + ($vssd3.BootOrder -join ',')
"BIOSNumLock=" + $vssd3.BIOSNumLock

# Cleanup
$r3 = $vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)
if($r3.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r3.Job | Out-Null }
